message:
feat(beads): add MVCC Observability epic with 15 improvement ideas

idea-wizard generated comprehensive program to make FrankenSQLite's
concurrent writer capabilities observable, debuggable, and provably superior:

Phase 1 - Core Observability:
- bd-t6sv2.1: MVCC Conflict Analytics & Observability Suite
- bd-t6sv2.2: Concurrent Writer Benchmark Suite & Regression CI
- bd-t6sv2.3: RaptorQ Self-Healing Observability & Verification

Phase 2 - User Guidance:
- bd-t6sv2.4: SQLite Conformance & Compatibility Dashboard
- bd-t6sv2.5: Transaction Lifecycle Analyzer & Advisor
- bd-t6sv2.6: Query Plan Concurrency Hints
- bd-t6sv2.7: Checkpoint Scheduling Advisor
- bd-t6sv2.8: Page Cache Efficiency Monitor
- bd-t6sv2.9: Write Amplification Tracker

Phase 3 - Best Practices:
- bd-t6sv2.10: Connection Pooling Validator
- bd-t6sv2.11: Schema Design Advisor for Concurrency
- bd-t6sv2.12: Deterministic Replay Debugger
- bd-t6sv2.13: Multi-Process Coordination Docs & Testing
- bd-t6sv2.14: Extension Compatibility Matrix
- bd-t6sv2.15: Version Chain GC Tuner

All beads include:
- Detailed implementation notes
- Test requirements with logging
- MVCC preservation guarantees
- Verification scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
